name: Apple Ads: Keyword Suggest
summary: Fetch Apple Ads keyword suggestions with popularity signals for a seed keyword.
description: Fetch Apple Ads keyword suggestions (with popularity signals) from the authenticated portal's internal endpoint `/cm/api/v2/keywords/recommendation`. Uses a same-origin request inside the browser session, so auth cookies are handled by the browser — no cookie scraping, no DOM parsing. Requires the user to be signed in to app-ads.apple.com.

adam_id.description: App adamId (App Store ID) used as the context app for suggestions.

adgroup_id.description: Ad group id from the portal URL.

campaign_id.description: Campaign id from the portal URL.

org_id.description: Apple Ads org id from the portal URL.

query.description: Seed keyword to request suggestions for.

steps.name: Navigate to the ad group keywords tab (ensures auth context)

help.summary: Fetch Apple Ads keyword suggestions with popularity signals for a seed keyword.

parameters.adam_id: App adamId (App Store ID) used as the context app for suggestions.
parameters.adgroup_id: Ad group id from the portal URL.
parameters.campaign_id: Campaign id from the portal URL.
parameters.org_id: Apple Ads org id from the portal URL.
parameters.query: Seed keyword to request suggestions for.

examples.command: rzn-browser run apple-ads keyword-suggest --param org_id="123456" --param campaign_id="555000111" --param adgroup_id="777000222" --param adam_id="1232780281" --param query="notes app"
examples.description: Ask the portal for keyword recs on 'notes app' in the context of the given ad group.

returns: JSON body from /cm/api/v2/keywords/recommendation — typically an object with a `recommendations` array where each item has `keyword`, `matchType`, `popularity`, and bid hints. Exact shape is owned by Apple's portal API.
notes: Requires an authenticated app-ads.apple.com session in the browser.
If the request returns 401/403, the portal auth expired — open a portal tab and re-auth.
The priming navigation to ?tab=0 is what makes XSRF cookies available to the same-origin step.
Prefer this workflow over DOM scraping; the portal's keyword UI is shadow-DOM heavy and brittle.
